title: Fiery Spicy Tunisian Lamb Tagine
description: A sour and snappy Tunisian dish featuring dried chillies and lamb, perfect for a low-carb meal prep option. This tagine is a flavorful and spicy stew that is sure to satisfy

ingredients.name: dried chillies
ingredients.notes: crushed or 1 teaspoon dried chilli flakes

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat
Add the lamb cubes and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes
Add the chopped onion and cook until it starts to soften, about 3 minutes
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant
Add the crushed dried chillies, tomato paste, chicken broth, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours, or until the lamb is tender
Remove the lid and simmer for an additional 30 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired
